# Acknowledgments

Jerboa is built on the work of these open source projects:

- [markdown-it](https://github.com/markdown-it/markdown-it) — Markdown parser
- [markdown-it-footnote](https://github.com/markdown-it/markdown-it-footnote) — footnote syntax plugin
- [markdown-it-task-lists](https://github.com/hackmdio/markdown-it-task-lists) — GFM task list plugin (HackMD fork)
- [XcodeGen](https://github.com/yonaskolb/XcodeGen) — Xcode project generation
- [SwiftLint](https://github.com/realm/SwiftLint) — Swift linting
